powerdns-recursor-3.5.3.patch

Recent changes to the Lua ports cause a build failure and have broken powerdns-recursor when LUA is enabled.
USES+= lua:51 also no longer worked so had to pet the Makefile a little.


Port maintainer (sten@blinkenlights.nl) is cc'd.
